_comment: Host-level bench tuning: automatic display pacing (verified VRR bounds when advertised, otherwise active signal timing) plus fixed feature-switch overrides applied at composition. The SAME host.features map the feature.set verb and bench.sweep drive live, here pinned as durable data. Shape only is parse-validated; runtime registration/type knowledge remains in FeatureSwitchRegistry. Run with: Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld-bench-host.json --timing
